remarks: Welcome to Sheffield Ridge! This 788 sq. ft. one-level unit features a generously sized, open layout with a large living room and a sizable bedroom, offering more square footage than most condos currently available in this price range. Located in an elevator building, the unit includes two unassigned parking spots in a gated lot and in-building laundry facilities. Monthly common charges are inclusive of heat, hot water, and cooking gas. Assessment beginning in May 2026, for both mechanical and cosmetic upgrades, has been paid in full by seller! This investor-friendly building has no rental limitations. Ideally located for convenience, situated across from Norwalk Hospital and within minutes of the SoNo train station, The SoNo Collection, parks, restaurants and the extensive shopping on Connecticut Avenue.
